title: 'Casey' — Jan 23 2020 7-second omen
html:
7-second voice memo titled "Casey" — Yahir says "the universe might be trying to tell you something. First, not Casey. Then you saw Leisha. Then you saw Tr—" and cuts off. A pattern-noticing micro-omen in the deja vu / heightened perception trigger register, three weeks after the New Year's time capsule where the same Alicia/Leisha/Kai thread surfaces. Worth pairing into a teen-romance synthesis later.

deja vu · heightened perception trigger · grants pass teen era · long distance relationship pattern · recording as note

related.label: Time-capsule recording — Jan 2 2020 'recording with my life'
